field_analogues.name: Ada Main Field (Names modified for copyright protection)
field_analogues.geology: Stacked Sands (A4/A5.1/A5.2/A6); Shoreface prograding environment; Faulted.
field_analogues.pvt: Saturated Black Oil; Primary Gas Cap; 23kbopd peak history.
field_analogues.drive_mechanism: Gas cap drive; Weak-to-moderate aquifer; Water injection support.
field_analogues.description: Complex stacked reservoir requiring history matching across 3 producing units and 22 well penetrations.

field_analogues.name: Equinor Volve Field
field_analogues.geology: Hugin Formation; Middle Jurassic sandstone; heavily faulted.
field_analogues.pvt: 32-35 API; Saturation pressure 210-240 bar; GOR 75-100 sm3/sm3.
field_analogues.drive_mechanism: Water injection and natural water drive.
field_analogues.description: A complete field dataset including production, seismic, and well logs.

field_analogues.name: SPE 9 Comparative Solution
field_analogues.pvt: Slightly compressible black oil; Saturated with gas cap.
field_analogues.description: The industry standard for testing black-oil simulator performance.

field_analogues.name: Norne Field (Benchmark)
field_analogues.geology: Ile and Tofte Formations; Sandstone with complex faulting.
field_analogues.pvt: Standard Black Oil; High quality production history.
field_analogues.tech_specs: 44,431 active cells; 22 production wells; 46,000 days history.
field_analogues.description: Widely used for history matching and optimization research.

field_analogues.name: Brugge Field
field_analogues.geology: Multi-layered (4 formations) with complex internal faulting.
field_analogues.description: Designed by TNO to test history matching and waterflooding strategies.

field_analogues.name: SPE 10 (Model 2)
field_analogues.geology: Fluvial deltaic (Upper Brent) and channelized (Lower Brent) sections.
field_analogues.tech_specs: 1.1 million cells; Highly heterogeneous; High perm channels.
field_analogues.description: The ultimate test for upscaling and fine-grid solver performance.

field_analogues.name: Gullfaks Field
field_analogues.geology: Brent Group; Complex structural traps; Multiple fault blocks.
field_analogues.tech_specs: Large scale; 100+ wells; High structural complexity.
field_analogues.description: Rich dataset for structural modeling and EOR studies.
